openingQuery: A milestone gift for a new homeowner

chat.content: A milestone gift for a new homeowner

For a housewarming milestone, the Olive Branch Vessel by Pellier Home ($185, Ivory) is the one — hand-thrown stoneware with a sculptural olive branch motif, rated 4.9 stars, the kind of piece that anchors a mantel or entryway from day one. It sits comfortably in your usual gift range and arrives wrapped in tissue with satin ribbon, so it feels like an event the moment it's opened.

plan.flowSummary: Dispatcher → Curator → find_pieces_hybrid (vector + Postgres FTS → RRF → cohere.rerank-v3-5:0) → editorial composition

toolCalls.sql:
WITH vector_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector) AS vector_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
  LIMIT 20
),
fts_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY ts_rank_cd(description_tsv, $2::tsquery) DESC) AS text_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
    AND description_tsv @@ $2::tsquery
  LIMIT 20
),
rrf AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(v.product_id, f.product_id) AS product_id,
         COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + v.vector_rank), 0) +
         COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + f.text_rank), 0) AS rrf_score
  FROM vector_results v
  FULL OUTER JOIN fts_results f USING (product_id)
)
SELECT product_id, rrf_score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT 30;
toolCalls.resultSummary: 30-candidate pool reranked to Olive Branch Vessel plus housewarming-ready alternates

subSteps.label: Postgres FTS branch (to_tsquery OR-of-stems via _build_or_tsquery, k=20)

telemetry.title: vector branch
telemetry.description: pgvector cosine over product_catalog (k=20); query embedding via cohere.embed-v4:0
telemetry.sql:
WITH query_embedding AS (
  SELECT $1::vector AS embedding
)
SELECT
  p.product_id,
  p.name,
  p.brand,
  p.price,
  1 - (p.embedding <=> q.embedding) AS similarity
FROM product_catalog p
CROSS JOIN query_embedding q
WHERE p.quantity > 0
ORDER BY p.embedding <=> q.embedding
LIMIT 20;

telemetry.title: Postgres FTS branch
telemetry.description: ts_rank_cd over description_tsv with GIN index (k=20)
telemetry.sql:
WITH query_terms AS (
  SELECT to_tsquery('english', 'milestone:* | housewarming:* | homeowner:* | home:*') AS q
)
SELECT
  p.product_id,
  p.name,
  p.brand,
  p.price,
  ts_rank_cd(p.description_tsv, query_terms.q) AS text_rank
FROM product_catalog p
CROSS JOIN query_terms
WHERE p.quantity > 0
  AND p.description_tsv @@ query_terms.q
ORDER BY text_rank DESC
LIMIT 20;

telemetry.title: RRF merge
telemetry.sql:
WITH vector_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY embedding <=> $1::vector) AS vector_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
  LIMIT 20
),
fts_results AS (
  SELECT product_id, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY ts_rank_cd(description_tsv, $2::tsquery) DESC) AS text_rank
  FROM product_catalog
  WHERE quantity > 0
    AND description_tsv @@ $2::tsquery
  LIMIT 20
),
rrf AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(v.product_id, f.product_id) AS product_id,
    COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + v.vector_rank), 0) +
    COALESCE(1.0 / (60 + f.text_rank), 0) AS rrf_score
  FROM vector_results v
  FULL OUTER JOIN fts_results f USING (product_id)
)
SELECT product_id, rrf_score
FROM rrf
ORDER BY rrf_score DESC
LIMIT 30;

telemetry.title: cohere.rerank-v3-5:0
telemetry.description: Cohere Rerank v3.5 — Bedrock cohere.rerank-v3-5:0 reranks 30 candidates

brief.headline: A lasting object for the first mantel

sections.title: The arc
paragraphs: Anna's constraint was occasion fit. The Curator's hybrid retrieval pulled 30 candidates by combining pgvector cosine (which caught 'milestone gift' as a vibe) with Postgres FTS (which caught 'new homeowner' as a literal). Cohere Rerank then reordered the pool by relevance to Anna's exact phrasing, and the final curation pass kept Olive Branch Vessel as the stable housewarming hero because retrieval had already surfaced it.

sections.title: Why hybrid + rerank earns its cost
paragraphs: Pure cosine returned tasteful home objects, but not all of them carried the homeowner signal. Postgres FTS alone returned literal-token matches but missed the 'milestone' editorial shape. RRF + Rerank combined: the durable home object stayed in the pool, gift-ready alternates followed, and the answer matched the occasion instead of just the category.
